title: audit — settings
description: Tenant-facing audit settings. Small config surface — most audit behavior is central (config.audit.*) or per-policy (AuditRetentionPolicy). This settings group governs tenant-tunable behaviors: PII redaction opt-in, custom event registration inspection, notification preferences.

groups.label: Audit
groups.description: Compliance-grade audit trail. Field-level diff of every mutation across every module.

sections.label: PII redaction
sections.description: Opt-in redaction of PII in old_values + new_values. Regulator-strict tenants may prefer redaction; most tenants keep it off (regulators need full context).

fields.name: redact_pii_in_old_new_values
fields.label: Redact PII in diff blobs
fields.helpText: When on, a registered PiiRedactor runs against old_values + new_values at save time. Values matching PII patterns (email, phone, credit card, national ID) are replaced with a SHA-256 hash. Default off — regulators typically need full diff context to reconstruct the mutation. Turn on only if your specific compliance obligation (medical, financial) demands stricter minimization.

fields.name: redact_pii_patterns
fields.label: Additional PII patterns to redact
fields.helpText: Additional regex patterns to add to the PII redaction pass. Only applies when redact_pii_in_old_new_values=true. Example: `\\bMRN\\d{7}\\b` to redact medical record numbers matching a specific tenant format.

sections.label: Compliance notifications
sections.description: Tune the retention-policy + purge notification cadence for the compliance officer.

fields.name: retention_expiring_soon_advance_days
fields.label: Advance-warning window for retention override expiry (days)
fields.helpText: Number of days before an AuditRetentionPolicy.override_ends_at date to fire the expiring-soon notification. Default 30 balances 'plenty of time to renew' against 'not so early that the officer forgets'.

sections.label: Export defaults
sections.description: Default filters + format for one-click DSAR + regulator export requests.

options.jsonl: JSON Lines (one object per line, gzip)

fields.name: saved_filters
fields.label: Saved export filter presets
fields.helpText: Named filter presets referenced by the audit:export --filters=<name> command. E.g. { "monthly_finance": { "auditable_type": "Membership", "since": "P30D" } }.

sections.label: Chain-of-custody
sections.description: Chain-of-custody metadata attached to raw-diff reveals + regulator exports.

fields.name: chain_of_custody_recipients
fields.label: Chain-of-custody notification recipients
fields.helpText: Comma-separated emails to CC on every raw-diff reveal event. Typically the tenant's DPO + external counsel.
